plugins.name: dingduff
plugins.description: DingDuff legal research & workflow skills for Claude: legal research (find, read, and validate cases, statutes, and regulations), legal analysis (frame issues, synthesize rules, structure proof), legal writing (draft memos, briefs, motions, demand and client letters), citation verification (/dingduff:dingduff-citation-check) of Markdown, Word, or Google Docs memos against stored sources plus attorney-supplied documents, and practitioner-style citation formatting. The research and verification skills use the DingDuff MCP connector.
